name: powerbuilder-semantics

# Powerbuilder Semantics

## Use when
Use for parser, symbol, diagnostic, completion, semantic token or signature-help work involving PowerBuilder semantics.

## Workflow
1. Inspect existing parser/symbol tests.
2. Map expected PowerBuilder behavior.
3. Check sourceOrigin/confidence/reasonCode.
4. Add focused fixtures/tests.
5. Update rules/catalog/docs if durable behavior changes.

## Output
- Findings or changes required
- Tests/docs affected
- Validation commands/results
- Remaining risks or unknowns
